description: Detect and count the bright stars in the VLT V-band image of Messier 12 located at ~/AstroImages/star_detection/m12_Vcomb.fits using AstroImageJ. Save the detected source catalog as a CSV file to ~/AstroImages/measurements/m12_star_catalog.csv. Additionally, create a summary text file at ~/AstroImages/measurements/m12_detection_summary.txt containing a single line stating the total number of detected sources in the format: 'Total detected sources: [number]'.

metadata.image_source: ESO Very Large Telescope (VLT) - Messier 12 V-band
